settings.heading: Apsara Attar
settings.subheading: Celestial attars inspired by the grace of the Apsaras — luminous, floral, and woven for everyday ritual and evening elegance.
settings.supporting_text: Soft florals and pure oils, handcrafted in small batches for a quiet, luminous presence.
